title: The Price of Bonney’s Freedom
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Luffy, Kizaru, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kuma as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shit!! Why can't I move my body!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Food- Please, give me some food-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to, but my body can't move!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Nobody except the Admiral could go inside...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A Barricade set up by an Emperor would only mean death!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This siege is currently even bigger than the one at "ohara!!!"

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Is Dr. Vegapunk going to be okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Kuma started going after the "Instinct fragment",

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where do you think he would go, IVA?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it was me, I'd certainly go to MarieJoa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why am I becoming weak again?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You are his daughter, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course you would know about that name. But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You don't know what that is exactly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The White form of Nika from "Straw Hat" doesn't seem

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: to have connected to her internally yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, which one of you gave him food?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IMMOBILIZE HIS HANDS IMMEDIATELY!! USE A "SEASTONE" HANDC OFF!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
